personality: Gentle, meticulous, deeply connected to growing things. Speaks in botanical metaphors.

greetingPool.text: The garden speaks to those who listen. Can I prepare something for you?
Comfrey for wounds, lavender for rest, thyme for courage. What ails you?
Mind where you step — that yarrow took all summer to coax into bloom.

idlePool.text: The foxglove is coming in beautifully this year. Deadly and lovely in equal measure.
I must dry these chamomile heads before the dew settles or they will lose their potency.
